channel.title: Sensitization Testing on MIKE Research Clusters
channel.description: Recent content in Sensitization Testing on MIKE Research Clusters

item.title: Artificial Intelligence in Cosmetic Dermatology: A Systematic Literature Review
item.description: Abstract Over the last ten years, the field of dermatology has experienced significant advancements through the utilization of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies. The adoption of such technologies is multifaceted, encompassing tasks such as screening, diagnosis, treatment, and prediction of treatment outcomes. The majority of prior systematic reviews in this domain were centered on medical dermatology, with the aim of detecting and managing serious skin diseases such as skin cancer. However, the adoption of AI in cosmetic dermatology, which focuses on improving skin conditions for cosmetic purposes, has not been comprehensively reviewed.
